flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at SUNY Adirondack fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (26.8% → 20.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY Adirondack rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $6.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at SUNY Adirondack rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.3k → $9.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at SUNY Adirondack rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.6k → $14.3k).
